Headline: #79 79th Temporary Reroute at 79th/Essex
ShortDescription: #79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via South Shore, 75th, Yates, then resume their normal route on 79th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via South Shore, 75th, Yates, then resume their normal route on 79th.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 79th/Essex.

Headline: #21 Cermak Temporary Westbound Reroute near Cermak/Marshall
ShortDescription: WB 21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via Cermak, Marshall, Ogden, Kedzie, Cermak and over normal route: due to police activity near Cermak/Marshall.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via Cermak, Marshall, Ogden, Kedzie, Cermak and over normal route: due to police activity near Cermak/Marshall.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
